# AutoTechify

> AutoTechify is the public workspace of a solo developer and IT systems engineer documenting real production environments and building automation software in the open. The flagship product is AutoWaba, a WhatsApp business automation platform.

AutoTechify covers practical IT automation, build-in-public progress, and tools for IT teams and business owners who want automation without complex setup. Content is hands-on and drawn from real production systems rather than theory.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://autotechify.com/): Overview of current builds and content.
- [Apps](https://autotechify.com/apps): Software products, including AutoWaba — a WhatsApp business automation dashboard for managing conversations, chatbots, broadcast campaigns, and AI answers trained on your own business knowledge.
- [Labs](https://autotechify.com/labs): Automation scripts, configurations, and small tools that eliminate repetitive work for IT teams and business owners.
- [Blog](https://autotechify.com/blog): Real problems from production environments — IT configurations, system failures, automation wins, and honest lessons.
- [About](https://autotechify.com/about): Background on the developer and the mission behind AutoTechify.
- [Contact](https://autotechify.com/contact): Get in touch.

## Products

- AutoWaba: WhatsApp business automation platform (currently building). Manage conversations, run chatbots, send broadcast campaigns, and let AI answer customer questions automatically.

## Contact

- Email: mail@d4dx.co

## Notes

- Preferred citation name: AutoTechify
- Canonical domain: https://autotechify.com
